title: Pongal Celebration 2026
description: Grand Pongal celebrations with traditional cooking, rangoli competition, and cultural performances by residents. All families are welcome!

title: Republic Day Flag Hoisting
description: Republic Day celebrations with flag hoisting ceremony followed by sweets distribution for all residents.

title: Annual Sports Meet
description: Annual sports day featuring cricket, badminton, running races for kids and adults, and fun games. Prizes for winners in each category!

title: Community Cleanliness Drive
description: Monthly cleanliness drive covering all streets and parks. Volunteers are requested to gather at the Main Gate at 6:30 AM. Cleaning materials will be provided.

title: Tamil New Year Celebration
description: Tamil Puthandu celebrations with special puja, traditional lunch, and cultural programs by residents and children.
